---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="gs-hero">
  <h1 class="gs-hero__title">Your first steps with LISSY</h1>
  <p class="gs-hero__sub">LISSY lets you load, analyse and visualize harmonized microdata from over 50 countries remotely, just as you would on your own machine.</p>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<div class="gs-cards">

  <div class="gs-card">
    <div class="gs-card__num">01</div>
    <div class="gs-card__body">
      <h3 class="gs-card__title">Register</h3>
      <p class="gs-card__desc">Check your eligibility and create your LISSY account.</p>
      <a href="/getting-started/registration.html" class="gs-card__link">→ Registration guide</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="gs-card">
    <div class="gs-card__num">02</div>
    <div class="gs-card__body">
      <h3 class="gs-card__title">Submit your first job</h3>
      <p class="gs-card__desc">Learn how to use the interface and get your first results back.</p>
      <a href="/getting-started/submit_first_job.html" class="gs-card__link">→ Submission guide</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <div class="gs-card">
    <div class="gs-card__num">03</div>
    <div class="gs-card__body">
      <h3 class="gs-card__title">Best practices</h3>
      <p class="gs-card__desc">Tips for writing efficient jobs and avoiding common pitfalls.</p>
      <a href="/getting-started/bp.html" class="gs-card__link">→ Best practices</a>
    </div>
  </div>

</div>
```



```{=html}
<div class="gs-capabilities">
  <h2 class="gs-section-title">What you can do in LISSY</h2>
  <div class="gs-cap-grid">

    <div class="gs-cap">
      <div class="gs-cap__icon">📦</div>
      <div>
        <strong>Load harmonized datasets</strong> for more than 50 countries worldwide.
        <span class="gs-cap__links"><a href="/r-users/method1.html#import_data_r">R</a> · <a href="/stata-users/method1.html#import_data_stata">Stata</a></span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gs-cap">
      <div class="gs-cap__icon">🔢</div>
      <div>
        <strong>Analyse and process data</strong> just as you would locally, with access to LIS-provided CPI and PPP deflators.
        <span class="gs-cap__links"><a href="/r-users/dh_cont_vars.html#ppp_in_r">R</a> · <a href="/stata-users/dh_ppp.html#ppp_in_stata">Stata</a></span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gs-cap">
      <div class="gs-cap__icon">📈</div>
      <div>
        <strong>Visualize your results</strong> directly within LISSY.
        <span class="gs-cap__links"><a href="/r-users/tidy_plots.html#plots_in_R">R</a> · <a href="/stata-users/tidy_plots.html#plots_in_stata">Stata</a></span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="gs-cap">
      <div class="gs-cap__icon">🗂️</div>
      <div>
        <strong>Archive your work</strong> and retrieve outputs from all past job submissions.
      </div>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```



```{=html}
<div class="gs-resources">
  <h2 class="gs-section-title">Data resources</h2>
  <div class="gs-res-grid">

    <div class="gs-res-card">
      <div class="gs-res-card__title">Coverage</div>
      <p>Countries and years covered by the <a href="https://www.lisdatacenter.org/our-data/lis-database/">LIS Database</a> and the <a href="https://www.lisdatacenter.org/our-data/lws-database/">LWS Database</a>, also available in <a href="https://www.lisdatacenter.org/wp-content/uploads/files/resources_datasets.txt">dataset format</a>.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="gs-res-card">
      <div class="gs-res-card__title">Variables</div>
      <p><a href="https://www.lisdatacenter.org/wp-content/uploads/files/data-lis-variables.pdf">LIS variables</a> and <a href="https://www.lisdatacenter.org/wp-content/uploads/files/data-lws-variables.pdf">LWS variables</a> documentation.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="gs-res-card">
      <div class="gs-res-card__title">Metadata tools</div>
      <p><a href="https://www.lisdatacenter.org/frontend#/home">METIS</a> and <a href="https://comparability.lisdatacenter.org/shiny/comparability/">Compare.it</a> for exploring variable availability and comparability across waves.</p>
    </div>

  </div>
</div>
```

```{=html}
<style>
/* Hero */
.gs-hero {
  padding: 2.5rem 0 1.5rem;
}
.gs-hero__badge {
  display: inline-block;
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.12em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #325d88;
  border: 1px solid #c7d3e0;
  border-radius: 20px;
  padding: 4px 14px;
  margin-bottom: 0.9rem;
}
.gs-hero__title {
  font-size: 2rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2e42;
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
  line-height: 1.2;
}
.gs-hero__sub {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #4a5568;
  max-width: 620px;
  line-height: 1.65;
  margin: 0;
}

/* Step cards */
.gs-cards {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1.25rem;
  margin: 2rem 0;
}
.gs-card {
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 10px;
  padding: 1.5rem;
  background: #f8fafc;
  display: flex;
  gap: 1rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
}
.gs-card__num {
  font-size: 1.4rem;
  font-weight: 800;
  color: #c7d3e0;
  line-height: 1;
  min-width: 2rem;
}
.gs-card__title {
  font-size: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2e42;
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem;
}
.gs-card__desc {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: #4a5568;
  margin: 0 0 0.75rem;
  line-height: 1.5;
}
.gs-card__link {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  font-weight: 600;
  color: #325d88;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.gs-card__link:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* Capabilities */
.gs-section-title {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1a2e42;
  margin: 0 0 1.25rem;
}
.gs-capabilities {
  margin: 2rem 0;
}
.gs-cap-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 1rem;
}
.gs-cap {
  display: flex;
  gap: 0.85rem;
  align-items: flex-start;
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 1rem 1.1rem;
  font-size: 0.92rem;
  color: #2d3748;
  line-height: 1.55;
}
.gs-cap__icon {
  font-size: 1.2rem;
  min-width: 1.5rem;
  margin-top: 1px;
}
.gs-cap__links {
  display: inline-block;
  margin-left: 0.4rem;
  font-size: 0.82rem;
  font-weight: 600;
}
.gs-cap__links a {
  color: #325d88;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.gs-cap__links a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* Resource cards */
.gs-resources {
  margin: 2rem 0;
}
.gs-res-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr);
  gap: 1.25rem;
}
.gs-res-card {
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  border-radius: 8px;
  padding: 1.25rem;
  background: #fdf6f3;
  border-color: #e8c9bc;
}
.gs-res-card__title {
  font-size: 0.72rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  letter-spacing: 0.1em;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  color: #D5490C;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.gs-res-card p {
  font-size: 0.88rem;
  color: #4a5568;
  line-height: 1.55;
  margin: 0;
}
.gs-res-card a {
  color: #325d88;
  text-decoration: none;
}
.gs-res-card a:hover {
  text-decoration: underline;
}

/* Responsive */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .gs-cards, .gs-res-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
  .gs-cap-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
</style>
```
</parameter>
